translations.```python\nimport firebase_admin\nfrom f:
```python
import firebase_admin
from firebase_admin import credentials
from firebase_admin import firestore

if not firebase_admin._apps:
  cred = credentials.Certificate('./身份驗證.json')
  firebase_admin.initialize_app(cred)
# Initializing app multiple times causes the following error:
# providing an app name as the second argument. In most cases you only need to call initialize_app() once. But if you do want to initialize multiple apps, pass a second argument to initialize_app() to give each app a unique name.
# So to be safe, check if initialized before calling initialize_app

db = firestore.client()
ref = db.collection(u'example') # collection name
stream = ref.stream()
for data in stream:
  print("id:"+data.id+","+data.to_dict())
```
translations.`asia-east2` (Hong Kong) 靠我們比較近，但需要支付微微的: `asia-east2` (Hong Kong) is closer to us but requires a small Cloud Storage fee.
translations.just in case…假設真的有狀況超出免費用量開始計價，我希望能收到通知；: just in case... If the usage exceeds the free tier and billing starts, I want to receive a notification; this prevents unexpected program errors from causing a sudden spike in the bill without my awareness...
translations.一個集合可以有多個文件，每個文件可以有各自的欄位內容；使用上非常彈性。\n\n: A collection can have multiple documents, and each document can have its own fields; this offers great flexibility in usage.
translations.一直以來「自動」這件事，我都很粗暴直接開一台電腦掛著 Python 腳本讓他掛著: I've always handled "automation" by simply running a Python script on a computer continuously; the advantage is simplicity and convenience, but the downside is needing a device connected to the internet and power. Even a Raspberry Pi consumes some electricity and network fees, and remote control to start or stop it is possible but cumbersome. This time, during some free work time, I explored free and cloud-based methods.
translations.一直以來都有使用 Python 做小工具的習慣；有做正經的，工作上自動爬數據、產: I have always been accustomed to using Python for small tools; sometimes for serious tasks like automating data scraping and report generation at work, and sometimes for casual purposes like scheduling automatic checks for desired information or letting scripts handle tasks that were originally manual.
translations.下一步填好基本訊息後按「Create」送出建立。\n\n: Next, after filling in the basic information, click "Create" to submit and create.
translations.下載完後啟動 Proxyman，安裝 Root 憑證（為了做 Man in th: After downloading, launch Proxyman and install the Root certificate (to perform a Man-in-the-middle attack and unpack HTTPS traffic).
translations.之前有發過一篇「 [APP有用HTTPS傳輸，但資料還是被偷了。](../464: I previously published an article titled "[The APP uses HTTPS, but data was still stolen.](../46410aaada00/)" The principle is similar, but this time I use Proxyman instead of mitmproxy; both are free, but Proxyman is easier to use.
translations.人的精力是有限的，現今科技資訊洪流，每個平台每個服務都想要榨取我們有限的精力；如: Human energy is limited. In today's flood of technology and information, every platform and service tries to drain our finite energy. If we can use automation scripts to share the load of daily tasks, accumulating small savings, we can save more energy to focus on what truly matters!
translations.他能很直白的翻譯給你所設定的語法實際意思。（點 **next** 可查看下次執行: It can straightforwardly translate the actual meaning of the syntax you set. (Click **next** to see the next execution time)

translations.其他設定都不需要動，直接「儲存」->「下一步」。\n\n: No other settings need to be changed. Just click "Save" -> "Next."
translations.到官網 <https://proxyman.io/>{:target=\"_bl: Go to the official website <https://proxyman.io/>{:target="_blank"} to download the Proxyman tool
translations.前往 [**Google Cloud Scheduler**](https://: Go to the [**Google Cloud Scheduler**](https://console.cloud.google.com/cloudscheduler/){:target="_blank"} console homepage.
translations.前面基本的講完了，正式進入本篇重頭戲；將 Python 腳本搬上雲端。\n\n: The basics are covered, now let's move on to the main part of this article: deploying the Python script to the cloud.
translations.動作這邊可以設定當預算達到多少百分比時會觸發通知。\n\n: You can set the action to trigger a notification when the budget reaches a certain percentage.
translations.參考 [官方定價](https://cloud.google.com/funct: Refer to the [official pricing](https://cloud.google.com/functions/pricing?hl=zh-tw){:target="_blank"} information, which includes 2 million invocations per month, 400,000 GB-seconds and 200,000 GHz-seconds of compute time, and 5 GB of internet egress traffic.
translations.參考 [官方定價](https://cloud.google.com/sched: Refer to the [official pricing](https://cloud.google.com/scheduler/pricing?hl=zh-tw){:target="_blank"} information, each account can set up 3 free jobs.
translations.參考 [官方定價](https://cloud.google.com/stora: Refer to the [official pricing](https://cloud.google.com/storage/pricing?hl=zh-tw){:target="_blank"} for details. Prices vary based on the hosting region.
translations.參考 [官方定價](https://firebase.google.com/do: Refer to the [official pricing](https://firebase.google.com/docs/firestore/quotas){:target="_blank"} for details. It includes 1 GB storage, 10 GB monthly bandwidth, 50,000 reads per day, and 20,000 writes/deletes per day; more than enough for light use!
translations.參考 [官方定價](https://tw.linebiz.com/service: Refer to the [official pricing](https://tw.linebiz.com/service/account-solutions/line-official-account/){:target="_blank"} information, which offers 500 messages free per month.
translations.可查看執行結果、上次執行日期\n: You can check the execution results and the date of the last run
translations.因涉及到敏感領域本篇不會告知是哪個簽到獎勵型 APP，大家可以延伸自行使用\n: Due to the sensitive nature, this article will not disclose which check-in reward app is used. Readers can apply the method to other apps on their own.
translations.在 Cloud Functions 上要在 `requirements.txt`: In Cloud Functions, you need to add `firebase-admin` to the `requirements.txt` file.
translations.在 Google Cloud 設定自動排程\n: Setting Up Automatic Scheduling in Google Cloud
translations.在專案主控台首頁，資源的地方點擊「Cloud Functions」\n: On the project console homepage, click "Cloud Functions" under Resources.
translations.在左方選單列找到「 **Cloud Firestore** 」-&gt;「 **: In the left sidebar, find "**Cloud Firestore**" -> "**Create Collection**"
translations.在手機上打開想要嗅探 API 傳輸內容的 APP\n: Open the APP on your phone whose API transmission you want to sniff.
translations.在程式中使用相對路徑 `./` 就能讀取到， **僅限讀取無法動態修改** ；要: Using relative paths `./` in the code allows reading files, **but only for reading, not for dynamic modification**; to make changes, you must modify in the console and redeploy.
translations.執行階段選「Python 3.x」並將寫好的 Python 腳本貼上，進入點改成: Select "Python 3.x" as the runtime, paste the written Python script, and set the entry point to "main".
translations.如果出現 `500 Internal Server Error` 則代表程式有錯: If a `500 Internal Server Error` occurs, it means there is an error in the program. You can click the name to view the "Logs" and find the cause there:
translations.如果剛剛 Cloud Functions 選擇的是 US-WEST1、US-CE: If you selected US-WEST1, US-CENTRAL1, or US-EAST1 for Cloud Functions, you can enjoy the free usage quota:
translations.如果沒使用過 Google Cloud 的朋友，請先前往 [**主控台**](h: If you haven't used Google Cloud before, please first go to the [**Console**](https://console.cloud.google.com/){:target="_blank"} to create a new project and set up your billing information.
translations.將 Python 腳本搬到 Google Cloud 上\n: Deploying the Python Script to Google Cloud
translations.將 Python 腳本搬到雲端執行、定時自動執行、可透過網路開啟/關閉。\n\n: Move the Python script to the cloud for execution, schedule automatic runs, and enable remote on/off control via the internet.
translations.將此 JSON 檔案放到同 Python 的專案目錄下。\n\n: Place this JSON file in the same project directory as the Python files.
translations.對腳本來說以上免費用量就綽綽有餘啦！\n\n: The above free quotas are more than enough for the script!
translations.展開左邊選單，進入「 **預算與快訊** 」功能\n: Expand the left menu and go to the "**Budget & Alerts**" feature
translations.建立好之後在第一個「Basic settings」Tab 下面找到「Your u: After setting up, find the "Your user ID" section under the first "Basic settings" tab. This is your User ID.
translations.建立好之後，選擇「Messaging API」Tab，掃描 QRCode 將機器: After setting it up, select the "Messaging API" tab and scan the QR code to add the bot as a friend.
translations.建立成功後可選擇「立即執行」測試一下正不正常。\n: After successful creation, you can choose "Run Now" to test if it works properly.
translations.想要從外部動態傳入變數到腳本中有以下方法：\n\n: To dynamically pass variables from outside into the script, you can use the following methods:
translations.我們使用「request」這個套件幫我們打 API，此套件不在原生 Python: We use the "request" package to make API calls. This package is not included in the native Python library; therefore, we need to add it here:
translations.我們已達成將例行任務 Python 腳本上傳到雲端＆設定自動排成自動執行的目標。: We have successfully uploaded the routine Python script to the cloud and set up automatic scheduling for execution.
translations.我是選擇 US-CENTRAL1 沒錯，可以看到第一個 Cloud Storag: I chose US-CENTRAL1 correctly, and you can see the first Cloud Storage instance is indeed in US-CENTRAL1, but the second one is labeled **Multiple US regions**; **I estimate this one will incur charges**.
translations.撰寫 Python 腳本，偽造 APP API 請求（模擬簽到動作）\n: Writing a Python script to spoof APP API requests (simulate check-in actions)
translations.新增、刪除更多操作請參考 [官方文件](https://firebase.goo: For adding or deleting more operations, please refer to the [official documentation](https://firebase.google.com/docs/firestore/manage-data/add-data){:target="_blank"}.
translations.有了腳本之後再來是要讓他自動執行才能達到我們的最終目標。\n\n: After having the script, the next step is to automate its execution to achieve our final goal.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"} .
If you have automation-related optimization needs, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}. Thank you.
translations.東躲西躲，還是躲不掉可能被收費的服務。\n\n: Hiding here and there, you still can't avoid potentially chargeable services.
translations.環境弄好後，可以來讀取我們剛剛新增的數據了：\n\n: After setting up the environment, we can now read the data we just added:
translations.當預算超過時我們就能馬上就能知道，避免產生更多費用。\n\n: We can immediately know when the budget is exceeded, preventing further costs.
translations.程式碼沒多大，估計應該就是每個月最低收費 0.0X0 元（？\n\n: The code is not large, so the estimated minimum monthly charge should be around 0.0X0 dollars (?
translations.程式碼部分 OK 之後，切換到「requirements.txt」輸入有用到的套: After the code part is done, switch to "requirements.txt" and enter the required package dependencies:
translations.繼續往下滾找到「Channel access token」區塊，點擊「Issue: Scroll down to the "Channel access token" section and click "Issue" to generate the token.
translations.複製下來產生出來的 Token，我們有這組 Token 就能發訊息給使用者。\n: The copied Token allows us to send messages to the user.
translations.請先使用 `pip install requests` 安裝套件。\n\n: First, install the package using `pip install requests`.
translations.請先到 [GCP控制台 -&gt; IAM與管理 -&gt; 服務帳戶](htt: First, go to [GCP Console -> IAM & Admin -> Service Accounts](https://console.cloud.google.com/iam-admin/serviceaccounts){:target="_blank"} and follow the steps below to download the authentication private key file:
translations.這時候 Mac 上的 Proxyman 就會出現嗅探到的流量，點擊裝置 IP 下: At this point, Proxyman on your Mac will display the sniffed traffic. Click on the desired APP API domain under the device IP to view it; the first time, you need to click "Enable only this domain" for the traffic to be unpacked.
translations.這邊指定版本 ≥ 2.25.1，也可不指定只輸入 `requests` 安裝最新: Here, the version is specified as ≥ 2.25.1, but you can also omit the version and just install the latest by using `requests`.
translations.這部分我一開始向中的是 Google Cloud Run 但用了下覺得太複雜，我: At first, I considered using Google Cloud Run but found it too complicated and didn’t want to spend time studying it, as my needs were too small to require so many features. So, **I used Google Cloud Function**, a serverless solution; it is actually more commonly used to build serverless web services.
translations.這部分我做的很簡單，僅共參考，僅通知自己。\n\n: This part is very simple; it only serves as a reference and notifies myself.
translations.還有一部分很重要，就是計價方式；Google Cloud、Linebot 都不是: Another important part is the pricing model; Google Cloud and Linebot are not entirely free services, so understanding their charges is crucial. Otherwise, spending too much money on a small script is not worth it compared to just leaving your computer running.
translations.部署完成後可由前面記下的「 **觸發網址** 」前去執行查看是否正確運行，或使用: After deployment, you can use the previously noted "**Trigger URL**" to run and check if it works correctly, or use "Actions" -> "Test Function" to perform a test.
translations.都 OK 之後點擊「部署」開始部署。\n: Once everything is OK, click "Deploy" to start the deployment.
translations.金額，輸入「 **目標金額** 」，可輸入 $1、$10；我們不希望在小東西上花: Amount: enter "**Target Amount**", you can input $1 or $10; we don't want to spend too much on small things.
translations.需要花約 1~3 分鐘的時間等他部署完成。\n\n: It takes about 1 to 3 minutes to complete the deployment.
translations.點擊「 **查看詳細扣款紀錄** 」進入。\n\n: Click "**View detailed billing records**" to enter.
translations.點擊名稱進入後也可按「編輯」修改腳本內容\n: Click the name to enter, then click "Edit" to modify the script content.
